subtitle: LITTER-ROBOT 4 Smart Self-Cleaning
overview:
Cats love a bit of luxury, so a pongy litter tray just won't cut it. This Litter-Robot 4 automatically sifts out waste every time your feline friend does their business – no more getting your hands dirty scooping poop. The waste gets stashed in a tightly sealed drawer with a carbon filter, so you won't be hit with any eye-watering whiffs when you come home. And the Whisker app lets you keep an eye on litter and waste levels from your phone. It can even track your cat's weight with SmartScale so you'll know if you need to go easy with the treats. Purrrfect!

And registering your pet is quick and easy with one-button setup – just press and go.Good to know- Choose which pets can enter and exit using DualScan technology and the pets implanted RFID microchip- Control the cat flap remotely from the Sure Petcare app – lock or unlock it anytime, anywhere and track your pet's activity- Monitor long-term behaviour patterns and get insights into changes that could signal health or wellbeing issues- You can share app access with friends and family and manage their permissions - It runs for up to 12 months on four AA batteries (sold separately)- The flashing low battery indicator l
